1: O LORD, who may abide in Your tent?Who may dwell on Your holy mountain?
2: He who walks with integrityand practices righteousness,who speaks the truth from his heart,
3: who has no slander on his tongue,who does no harm to his neighbor,who casts no scorn on his friend,
4: who despises the vilebut honors those who fear the LORD,who does not revise a costly oath,
5: who lends his money without interestand refuses a bribe against the innocent.He who does these thingswill never be shaken.
